productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Shirt White Shirts
description: Style Note A shirt that's just right for the summer. Comfy and light to keep him happy and made to last through all the scrambles he gets into (to keep you happy!) For a semi-formal vibe, style this with denims - substitute them with cargo pants for a more fun look! Product Details Red and white checked shirt with a spread collar, buttoned tabs at the shoulder, short sleeves with buttoned tabs at the cuffs, two flap pockets at the chest and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton  Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Style NoteA shirt that's just right for the summer.
